scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-ytdlp-standalone.js && node scripts/clean-macos-xattrs.js && vite build && node -e "console.log('\n▸ Étape Electron (electron-builder) — peut rester silencieux plusieurs minutes.\n')" && cross-env DEBUG= NM_DEBUG_LEVEL=-1 electron-builder
scripts.build:mac: node scripts/ensure-ytdlp-standalone.js && node scripts/clean-macos-xattrs.js && vite build && node -e "console.log('\n▸ Étape Electron + DMG — analyse node_modules puis packaging, souvent sans nouveau log pendant des minutes.\n')" && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-electron',{recursive:true,force:true});" && cross-env CI=true CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false DEBUG= NM_DEBUG_LEVEL=-1 electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:win: node scripts/ensure-ytdlp-standalone.js && node scripts/clean-macos-xattrs.js && vite build && node -e "console.log('\n▸ Étape Electron (electron-builder) — peut rester silencieux plusieurs minutes.\n')" && cross-env DEBUG= NM_DEBUG_LEVEL=-1 electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.publish:github: node scripts/ensure-ytdlp-standalone.js && node scripts/clean-macos-xattrs.js && vite build && node -e "console.log('\n▸ Étape Electron (electron-builder) — peut rester silencieux plusieurs minutes.\n')" && cross-env DEBUG= NM_DEBUG_LEVEL=-1 electron-builder --publish always
